channel.title: Developer Resume Tips on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Developer Resume Tips on simeononsecurity

item.title: Software Development Career Playbook: From First Commit to Engineering Lead
item.category: "software development career" , "software engineering" , "career playbook" , "programming" , "developer career" , "career guidance" , "professional development"
item.description: A comprehensive guide to launching, growing, and leading a software development career. Covers programming languages, education paths, job searching, career advancement, and engineering leadership.

item.title: Getting a Job as a Software Developer
item.category: "software developer job search" , "developer resume tips" , "software engineer interview prep" , "coding interview" , "entry level developer jobs" , "remote developer jobs"
item.description: Practical strategies for landing your first or next software development role — resume writing, interview prep, coding challenges, and where to find developer jobs.
